persona.title: How will you use Mix Architect?
persona.artistFeatures: Release planning, audio review, distribution tracking, and more
persona.engineerDesc: I work on other people's projects
persona.engineerFeatures: Everything included: payments, client portal, invoicing, plus all release tools
persona.bothDesc: I release my own music and work on client projects
persona.bothFeatures: Full suite: client tools, payments, release planning, and distribution
persona.other: Something else? Start with full access
persona.note: This helps us tailor your experience. You can change this anytime in Settings.

locale.title: Where are you based?
locale.subtitle: This sets your currency and number formatting.
locale.note: You can change this anytime in Settings.

confirmation.title: You're all set!
confirmation.changeNote: You can change any of these in Settings.

stepDesc.create-title: Give your project a working title. You can always change it later.
stepDesc.create-artist: The performing artist or band. This appears on your release and can connect to the client portal.
stepDesc.create-type: Singles auto-create one track. EPs and albums let you add multiple tracks later.
stepDesc.create-format: Choose Stereo, Dolby Atmos, or both. This sets the target format for all tracks.
stepDesc.create-genres: Tag your release with genres to help organize your catalog. You can pick from the suggestions or type in any genre you like to create your own. This step is optional.
stepDesc.create-date: Set a target date for your release. This helps you track your timeline and keep things on schedule.
stepDesc.create-submit: Hit the button to create your release. You’ll be able to explore it right away.
stepDesc.release-tabs: These tabs organize your release: Tracks, Globals, Distribution, and Financials. Each section helps manage a different aspect of your project.
stepDesc.release-sidebar: Upload cover art, view release info, and add internal or client notes here.
stepDesc.release-track-link: Click into a track to see its details — mix intent, specs, audio versions, and more.
stepDesc.track-tabs: Each tab captures a different aspect: Intent (your vision), Specs (technical requirements), Audio (uploads & versions), and more.
stepDesc.track-intent: Describe the vision for this mix — mood, references, and direction. This is the heart of your brief.
stepDesc.dashboard-card: Each release shows its status, track progress, and key info at a glance. Click to dive back in.
stepDesc.dashboard-nav: The sidebar gives you quick access to all sections — Releases, Artists, Templates, Payments, and Analytics.

dashboard.title: Releases
dashboard.noReleasesDesc: Create your first release to start building track briefs, managing specs, and organizing your mix workflow.
dashboard.noFilteredReleasesDesc: Try adjusting your search or filters.

new.title: New Release
new.freeToTry: Free to try. No credit card required.
new.freePlanNote: Free plan includes 1 release. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited releases.
new.templateDesc: Pre-fill your release settings, or start from scratch.
new.setupNote: Set up your project. You can always edit these details later.
new.genreTagsPlaceholder: Type and press Enter to add

releaseDetail.name: Name
releaseDetail.directionPlaceholder: Overall sonic vision for this release...
releaseDetail.whatToReference: What to reference about this song
releaseDetail.invalidImageType: Invalid image type. Use PNG, JPG, WebP, or GIF.
releaseDetail.noTracksDescEdit: Add tracks to start building out this release.
releaseDetail.noTracksDescView: No tracks have been added yet.

releaseSettings.title: Release Settings
releaseSettings.editDescription: Edit the details for this release.
releaseSettings.viewDescription: View the details for this release.
releaseSettings.globalDirectionPlaceholder: Overall sonic vision for this release...
releaseSettings.estimatedFeeHint: This release has quotes. The Financial Summary uses quote totals for billing.
releaseSettings.paymentNotesPlaceholder: Payment terms, deposit info, due date...
releaseSettings.teamDesc: Invite collaborators and clients to this release.
releaseSettings.removeMemberConfirm: Remove {email}? They will lose access to this release.
releaseSettings.noTeamMembers: No team members yet. Invite someone to get started.

artists.title: Artists
artists.emptyDesc: Artists will appear here once you create releases with artist names.

artistInfo.renamingNote: Renaming updates all releases by this artist
artistInfo.renameConfirm: This will rename "{oldName}" to "{newName}" across all releases. Continue?

templates.title: Templates
templates.emptyDesc: Templates save your go-to release settings, specs, delivery formats, and client info, so you can start new projects in seconds.

quotes.title: Quotes
quotes.emptyDescription: Create your first quote to start collecting payments.

actions.confirmDelete: Delete this quote? This cannot be undone.
actions.confirmCancel: Cancel this quote? The client will no longer be able to pay.

builder.title: Title
builder.notesPlaceholder: Add any notes for the client...
builder.internalNotesHelp: Only you can see these notes.
builder.emailRequired: Client email is required to send a quote.

mixDefaults.title: Mix Defaults
mixDefaults.description: These values will be used as defaults for new tracks.

regionCurrency.title: Region & Currency
regionCurrency.localeHelp: Sets number formatting, currency symbol, and date display.
regionCurrency.defaultCurrencyHelp: Pre-filled on new releases. You can override per release.

persona.title: I use Mix Architect as
persona.engineerLabel: Engineer / Producer, working on client projects
persona.bothLabel: Both, I release my own music and work on client work
persona.note: This controls which features are shown by default. Switching doesn't delete any data.

featureVisibility.title: Feature Visibility
featureVisibility.description: Control which features appear in your sidebar and release pages. Hidden features aren't deleted — you can re-enable them anytime.

paymentTracking.title: Payment Tracking
paymentTracking.description: Track fees and payment status on releases and tracks. Turn this off if you're mixing your own projects.
paymentTracking.enableHelp: Shows fee and paid/unpaid status on releases and tracks

data.title: Your Data
data.description: Download a complete copy of your Mix Architect data, including all release metadata, payment records, and audio files.
data.exportSummary: {releaseCount, plural, one {# release} other {# releases}}, {trackCount, plural, one {# track} other {# tracks}}, {audioFileCount, plural, one {# audio file} other {# audio files}}

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.description: Subscribe to your release dates in any calendar app.
calendar.regenerateWarning: Regenerating will break any existing calendar subscriptions.
calendar.setupGoogle: Google Calendar: Other calendars > From URL > paste the link
calendar.setupApple: Apple Calendar: File > New Calendar Subscription > paste the link
calendar.setupOutlook: Outlook: Add calendar > From internet > paste the link

workflows.title: Workflow Automations
workflows.description: Automate common tasks. When an event happens, Mix Architect takes the configured action automatically.

stripeConnect.title: Payment Collection
stripeConnect.description: Connect your Stripe account to collect payments directly from clients.
stripeConnect.descriptionConnected: Your Stripe account is connected and ready to collect payments.
stripeConnect.notConnectedHelp: Connect Stripe to send quotes and collect payments directly from clients. You'll be the merchant of record — funds go straight to your Stripe account.
stripeConnect.disconnectConfirm: Disconnect your Stripe account? You won't be able to collect payments until you reconnect.
stripeConnect.statusPendingHelp: Complete your Stripe account setup to start accepting payments.
stripeConnect.platformFee: Mix Architect charges a 1% platform fee on transactions.
stripeConnect.connectError: Failed to connect Stripe account. Please try again.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Connect cloud storage to import files directly into your releases.
integrations.connectError: Failed to connect. Please try again.
integrations.disconnectConfirm: Disconnect {provider}? You can reconnect at any time.

emailNotifications.title: Email Notifications
emailNotifications.description: Choose which emails you receive from Mix Architect.
emailNotifications.welcomeHelp: Sent when you create your account
emailNotifications.releaseLiveHelp: When your release goes live on a platform
emailNotifications.newCommentHelp: When someone comments on your release
emailNotifications.clientFeedbackHelp: When a client approves or requests changes on a track
emailNotifications.paymentReceivedHelp: When a subscription payment is processed
emailNotifications.weeklyDigestHelp: A weekly summary of activity across your releases

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.cancelNote: Your Pro plan will end on {date}. You can resubscribe from Manage Billing.

help.title: Help Center
help.description: Docs, bug reports, feature requests, and contact.
help.whatsNewDesc: Latest updates and improvements to Mix Architect.
help.noChangelog: No updates yet — check back soon!
help.getInTouchDesc: For direct support, questions, or partnership inquiries, reach out via email.

approval.changePlaceholder: e.g., Vocals too quiet in the chorus, needs more low end...

approval.failedSubmitChanges: Failed to submit changes. Please try again.
approval.failedUndo: Failed to undo. Please try again.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: This release or track doesn't exist, or you may not have access to it.

distribution.title: DISTRIBUTION TRACKER
distribution.notFoundYet: Not found yet. We'll keep checking.
distribution.allPlatformsTracked: All platforms are already being tracked.
distribution.notFoundYetDaily: Not found yet. We'll keep checking daily.

landing.headline: Plan releases. Review mixes. Track payments. All in one place.
landing.subheadline: Mix Architect is the release management platform built for independent artists and audio professionals.
landing.forArtistsDesc: Releasing your own music? Organize every step from mix brief to distribution.
landing.artistFeature1: Plan releases with target dates and milestones
landing.artistFeature2: Review mixes and leave timestamped notes
landing.forEngineersDesc: Working with clients? Manage projects, share reviews, and track who owes what.
landing.engineerFeature1: Client portal for approvals and file delivery
landing.freeToTry: Free to try. No credit card required.
landing.featureReleasePlanning: Every release, organized from day one
landing.featureReleasePlanningDesc: Create a release, add your tracks, set your timeline. Mix Architect tracks everything from first rough mix to final delivery so nothing falls through the cracks.
landing.featureClientDelivery: Share work that looks as professional as it sounds
landing.featureClientDeliveryDesc: Give clients a web portal to review mixes, approve tracks, and download deliverables. Optionally gate downloads until payment is confirmed. Every shared link is a calling card for your business.
landing.featureAudioReview: Review mixes with precision, not paragraphs
landing.featureAudioReviewDesc: Upload audio, see the waveform, drop timestamped comments exactly where you hear the issue. Switch between versions instantly. No more 'around the 2-minute mark' emails.
landing.featureFlowSim: Hear your tracklist before you commit
landing.featureFlowSimDesc: Audition your album flow with the built-in simulator. Preview transitions between tracks in full-length or condensed mode, drag to reorder, then apply your final sequence to the release.
landing.featurePayments: Know who owes what, at a glance
landing.featurePaymentsDesc: Track project fees, partial payments, and outstanding balances across every release. See your total revenue and what's still pending. Export for invoicing and tax time.
landing.featurePaymentsBadge: Built for freelance engineers and producers
landing.featureDistribution: See where every release stands, across every platform
landing.featureDistributionDesc: Track submission status for Spotify, Apple Music, Amazon, Tidal, YouTube Music, and more. Spotify auto-detects when your release goes live. One dashboard instead of six.
landing.featureAnalytics: Know your numbers without a spreadsheet
landing.featureAnalyticsDesc: Release velocity, turnaround time, revenue by month, and a per-client breakdown. See which clients drive your business and where your time goes.
landing.featureTemplates: Save your setup, skip the busywork
landing.featureTemplatesDesc: Create templates from your existing releases and apply them to new projects in one click. Pre-fill track counts, specs, and references for the artists you work with regularly.
landing.featureExportDesc: Download a complete copy of your account. Metadata, payment records, and every audio file, neatly organized in a single zip. Your work is always yours.
landing.audioToolsDesc: Everything you need to manage audio, without switching apps.
landing.toolLufsDesc: Automatically checks loudness against Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube, and 8 other platform targets.
landing.toolFormatConversionDesc: Convert between WAV, AIFF, FLAC, and MP3 with full metadata embedding: artist, title, cover art, ISRC, lyrics, and ReplayGain, all written into the file.
landing.toolWaveformDesc: See your audio, not just hear it. WaveSurfer-powered waveforms with zoom and seeking.
landing.toolCommentsDesc: Drop feedback at the exact moment in the track. Color-coded markers on the timeline.
landing.toolMixBriefDesc: Generate a shareable brief document from your intent, specs, and references.
landing.toolVersionControlDesc: Upload new versions, compare side by side, keep every revision accessible.
landing.featuredReleaseDesc: Spotlighting great releases and the people behind the sound.
landing.pricingSubheadline: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready.
landing.pricingNote: No credit card required for the free tier. Cancel Pro anytime in two clicks.
landing.pricingFreeDesc: Perfect for independent artists getting started
landing.pricingProDesc: Everything you need to run a professional operation
landing.pricingFreeF2: Mix brief builder with intent & references
landing.testimonial1Quote: I used to lose track of revisions across email threads and Dropbox folders. Now every mix note, reference, and approval lives in one place.
landing.testimonial2Quote: The client portal alone is worth it. My clients can review mixes and approve tracks without me sending a single email.
landing.finalCtaHeadline: Your next release deserves better than a spreadsheet
landing.finalCtaDesc: Start planning for free. Upgrade when you're ready.

auth.name: Name

auth.signInFailed: Sign in failed. Please try again.
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.resetLinkSentDescription: We sent a password reset link to {email}. Click the link to set a new password.
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.resetPasswordNoSession: Invalid or expired reset link. Please request a new one.
auth.resetPasswordFailed: Failed to update password. Please try again.
